scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run knip && bun run lint && AGENT=1 bun test --coverage
scripts.check:ci: bun run typecheck && bun run knip && bun run lint:ci && AGENT=1 bun test --coverage
scripts.setup-hooks:
bun -e 'await Bun.write(".husky/pre-commit", "#!/usr/bin/env sh

bun run knip && bun run lint-staged
")' && chmod +x .husky/pre-commit
